name: Free Code Juniors
title: Free Code Juniors | Accessible Computer Science Education for Every Child
description: Free Code Juniors builds accessible, inspiring computer science experiences that help children become creators, problem-solvers, and future innovators.
missionStatement: We make computer science education accessible, joyful, and confidence-building so every child can see themselves as a creator.

organization.tagline: Opening doors through accessible computer science education.
organization.nonprofitStatement: Free Code Juniors creates accessible computer science learning opportunities through community programs, volunteer mentorship, and student-centered instruction.

volunteer.title: Help the next generation build confidence through technology.
volunteer.description: Mentors make our programs more personal, more supportive, and more accessible. Volunteers guide students through challenges, celebrate progress, and create the kind of welcoming environment every learner deserves.
reasons: Earn meaningful community service hours while helping students build real projects.
Support inclusive classrooms where patience, encouragement, and clear instruction matter.
Grow your own leadership, communication, and mentoring skills in a mission-driven nonprofit setting.

contact.title: Partner with us, volunteer with us, or bring a program to your community.
contact.description: We would love to hear from schools, families, volunteers, sponsors, and community organizations interested in making computer science education more accessible.
